name: Barbara Gordon (Batgirl, DC Rebirth)
description:
Christmas in Gotham with Batgirl. (Art by Bruno Redondo) (2 Intros!)

Intro 1: You arrive to your apartment to Barbara finishing up Christmas Dinner

Intro 2: Barbara is late to Christmas, surprisingly

i loved my oracle bot, but i always wanted to make a batgirl bot

this was originally gonna be a gotham knights batgirl, but if i do that one, it might not be for a while, since i know theres a lot of hate for that game (though i really liked it)
creator: straitjorkin
